title: Courage.
content:
Carelessly over the plain away,
    Where by the boldest man no path
    Cut before thee thou canst discern,
    Make for thyself a path!

    Silence, loved one, my heart!
    Cracking, let it not break!
    Breaking, break not with thee!
meaning:
Johann Wolfgang von Goethe's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Courage."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
